name: Ginger Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 2-inch piece of ginger, peeled and minced
1 tbsp Dry sherry or rice vinegar
1 can (8 1/2 oz) Bamboo shoots, rinsed and drained, sliced lengthwise
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse and dry the chicken; rub with ground ginger.
2. Cut into 1/2-inch strips.
3. Combine the remaining ingredients (except chicken) to make a marinade; pour over the chicken.
4. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes.
5. Heat oil in a wok or large cast-iron skillet.
6. Stir-fry onion rings for 2 minutes.
7. Add mushrooms and bamboo shoots; stir-fry for another 2 minutes.
8. Remove vegetables and set aside.
9. Add the remaining olive oil, crushed garlic, and ginger to the pan.
10. Brown the garlic and ginger, then discard them.
11. Add chicken strips and stir-fry until coated with oil.
12. Add marinade and 1 cup of chicken stock; cover and cook on medium heat until the chicken is opaque.
13. Whisk together sugar, cornstarch, and remaining chicken stock.
14. Pour the mixture over the chicken and cook for several minutes.
15. Add the reserved vegetables and toss to combine.
